title: cuphea retrorsicapilla
intro: Cuphea retrorsicapilla, also known as the butterfly weed, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico, belonging to the family Lythraceae. The plant contains medicinal properties, specifically the alkaloid cupheine, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Cuphea retrorsicapilla include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas or infusions for medicinal use, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
